rows.finalText: Across "How do I commit to the path that feels deeply aligned", Purpose / Calling with a commitment emphasis gives the clearest frame. rows.finalText: On "What is the next right step in my calling", this 3-card leans into purpose / calling themes with a right path emphasis. The sequence begins in Past with Mice (23), so reduce stressors and prevent gradual depletion is already in play. Here, Mice emphasizes the small repeated drain that weakens conviction or meaning if it is left unaddressed. Coffin (8) in Present acts as the fulcrum, putting a cycle closes to make space for renewal where the sequence can turn. Coffin often points to the part of the old path that has already finished. What develops in Future through Sun (31) points to energy and confidence support forward movement, provided the central pressure is handled honestly. Sun colors your calling through confidence, visibility, success, and the warming effect of momentum that is finally obvious. Mice (23) and Coffin (8) reveal the deeper logic of the path, and it points to a blend of erosion and ending, asking you to patch leaks and simplify while staying alert to holding onto what has completed. The spread turns on Coffin (8) more than any other card. Here, Coffin emphasizes the part of the old path that has already finished, and the rest that is needed before anything genuinely new can take root. Mice (23) with Coffin (8) keep emphasizing a blend of erosion and ending, asking you to patch leaks and simplify while staying alert to holding onto what has completed. Allow closure and protect recovery time so Sun (31) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
